summary: A stellar show with a sweet Dark Star, captured on a very nice recording by Keith.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance – the first set was “damned awesome” and the second set featured an unforgettable Dark Star that had the crowd buzzing. The recording, made by Keith, is praised as clear and pleasant, making the magic of the night easy to relive.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 5‑star ratings and highlighted an outstanding performance plus a high‑quality recording, yielding an exceptional combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as "very nice" and say it captured the sweet Dark Star well; no issues or artifacts are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic first set followed by a second‑set Dark Star that elevated the whole concert, with a palpable high‑energy vibe throughout.
